decisions.title: Prioritize Explore V2 polish over new features for Q2
decisions.context: 30 signals show active Explore V2 work (ENG-9734 polish, ENG-8298 time series, ENG-9709 table sync, ENG-6386 refresh, ENG-8756 sync issues, ENG-7144 calc channels, ENG-9728 hovercard). Heavy focus on fixing core UX issues vs new capabilities. Aligns with 'Nail the Core' pillar.

arguments.for: Signals show 10+ active polish/bug tickets. Core stability drives Decisions Captured metric. Customer trust requires reliability before features.
arguments.against: Canvas (ENG-9309) and Python Rules work may stall. Competitors shipping features faster. Team may lose momentum on innovation.

decisions.title: Commit Canvas metadata (ENG-9309) to public beta by May
decisions.context: Canvas is 'Build the Moat' differentiator. Metadata capability foundational for multi-user collaboration. Only 1 signal shows active Canvas work vs 30 for Explore, suggesting under-resourcing.
decisions.blockedBy: Unclear resourcing priority vs Explore V2 polish work

arguments.for: Canvas is unique moat builder. Metadata unlocks team collaboration use cases. Early beta feedback critical for 2026 H2 roadmap.
arguments.against: Explore V2 stability issues may hurt existing customers. Canvas early adopter base still small. May fragment engineering focus.

decisions.title: Fast-track partner landing pages (GTM-108, GTM-110) to support embed strategy
decisions.context: Revel and Manufacturo partner pages signal 'Embed Deeper' pillar activation. GTM leading with 2 partner page builds. Aligns with external integration strategy.

arguments.for: Partner ecosystem drives embedded decision workflows. Landing pages accelerate partner onboarding. Low-cost high-signal GTM play.
arguments.against: Only 2 partners identified. ROI unclear without broader partner pipeline. Engineering may need to support integrations.

decisions.title: Resolve live mode issues (ENG-9194, ENG-8624) before expanding real-time features
decisions.context: 2 critical live mode bugs show real-time data workflows broken. Live mode essential for operational decision-making (North Star metric). Blocking further real-time investments.
decisions.blockedBy: Root cause analysis incomplete; may require table rendering refactor

arguments.for: Live mode drives high-frequency decisions. Bugs erode trust in platform. Fixes unblock streaming analytics roadmap.
arguments.against: Edge cases with low customer impact. Engineering capacity better spent on new features. Workarounds may exist.

decisions.title: Define global navigation strategy (ENG-9654) to unify product experience
decisions.context: Global left nav discovery work suggests fragmented navigation across Explore V2, Canvas, Rules. Poor nav reduces Decisions Captured by hiding capabilities.

arguments.for: Unified nav increases feature discovery. Reduces cognitive load across workflows. Supports 'Nail the Core' by simplifying UX.
arguments.against: Navigation changes risk disrupting power users. Design consensus may take months. Engineering cost high for cosmetic change.

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy meeting load (80% calendar) limiting strategic thinking time. 3 one-on-ones consumed by reactive issue triage. Only 2 focus blocks protected for roadmap planning.
alerts: Zero time allocated to Canvas roadmap review this week
Back-to-back meetings preventing async signal processing
No capacity scheduled for partner strategy (GTM-108/110) alignment
